zh.Gumbrechtshoffen, Bas Rhim, Alsace-Lorri: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾古布雷次霍分
zh.Tulpeshocken, Berks, Pennsylvania, Unite: 美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯
zh.Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wendel Leibenguth於1676年出生在法國阿爾薩斯時，他的父親Friedrich Leibenguth37歲，母親Maria Müller21歲。他於1725年5月15日與Anna Margaretha Schaffers在法國阿爾薩斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1754年在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯享年78歲。

zh-hans.Gumbrechtshoffen, Bas Rhim, Alsace-Lorri: 法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾古布雷次霍分
zh-hans.Tulpeshocken, Berks, Pennsylvania, Unite: 美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯
zh-hans.Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wendel Leibenguth于1676年出生在法国阿爾薩斯时，他的父亲Friedrich Leibenguth37岁，母亲Maria Müller21岁。他于1725年5月15日与Anna Margaretha Schaffers在法国阿爾薩斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1754年在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯享年78岁。

nl.Tulpeshocken, Berks, Pennsylvania, Unite: Berks, Pennsylvania, Verenigde Staten van Amerika

nameMeanings.name: Wendel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the folk name for a Wend, a member of a Slavic people living in the area between the Elbe and the Oder, who were overrun by Germanic migrants in the 12th century.  St Wendel  was a 6th- or 7th-century shepherd and confessor, who is venerated especially at Sanktwendel on the River Nahe.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.
Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Wendel Leibenguth was born in 1676, in Alsace, France, his father, Friedrich Leibenguth, was 37 and his mother, Maria Müller, was 21. He married Anna Margaretha Schaffers on 15 May 1725, in Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1754, in Berks, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wendel Leibenguth est né en 1676, à Alsace, France, son père, Friedrich Leibenguth, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Maria Müller, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anna Margaretha Schaffers le 15 mai 1725, à Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1754, à Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wendel Leibenguth 1676 in Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich Leibenguth 37 und seine Mutter Maria Müller 21. Er hat am 15. Mai 1725 in Elsaß, Frankreich Anna Margaretha Schaffers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1754 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Berks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wendel Leibenguth è nato il nel 1676 nel Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Friedrich Leibenguth, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Maria Müller, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Anna Margaretha Schaffers il 15 maggio 1725, nel Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1754, nel Berks, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wendel Leibenguthが1676年にフランスアルサスで生まれた時，父Friedrich Leibenguthは37歳，母Maria Müllerは21歳であった。1725年5月15日にフランスアルサスでAnna Margaretha Schaffersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1754年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wendel Leibenguth(이)가 1676년 프랑스 알사스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich Leibenguth(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Müller(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1725년 5월 15일 프랑스 알사스에서 Anna Margaretha Schaffers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1754년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Tulpeshocken, Berks, Pennsylvania, Unite: Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wendel Leibenguth nasceu em 1676, em Alsace, França, seu pai, Friedrich Leibenguth, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Maria Müller, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Margaretha Schaffers em 15 de maio de 1725, em Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1754, em Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 78 anos.

ro.Tulpeshocken, Berks, Pennsylvania, Unite: Berks, Pennsylvania, Statele Unite ale Americii

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wendel Leibenguth родился в 1676 г. в местности алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Friedrich Leibenguth было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Müller, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Margaretha Schaffers 15 мая 1725 г. в местности алсеис, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1754 г. в местности биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет.

Se casó con Anna Margaretha Schaffers el 15 de mayo de 1725, en Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1754, en Berks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 78 años.
